MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS
Off Calendar Jan-12-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearance: John Fitzpatrick Vannucci, Plaintiff/Moving Party
Andres L. Williams, Defendant/Opposing Part

Ruling:
Tentative Ruling adopted:
Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Admission (Set One), Form Interrogatories (Set One), and Responses Without Objection To Inspection Demands is granted. Late opposition has not been considered. Defendants' objections are overruled. Defendants' failure to respond fully was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendants are ordered to respond further and to produce documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $1,400, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
